session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report the results. Show any failures in full detail.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target to check code quality

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. ✓ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired.
CLAUDE.md files checked: 19 Violations: 0 make: *** [Makefile:97: fast-ci] Error 1
=== Fast CI ===
--- Lint --- All checks passed!
--- Format Check --- 1731 files already formatted
--- Prettier Check --- Checking formatting...
--- Markdown Check ---
--- Exec Reference Check --- OK: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date
--- ty --- All checks passed!
... [109 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command failed due to **Prettier formatting issues**. Here's the summary:
## Summary
**Status**: FAILED (Exit code 2)
### Issues Found
**Prettier Check - Code style issues in 2 files:**
1. `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 2. `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
These files need to be formatted with Prettier. Run `prettier --write` to fix them.
### Detailed Breakdown
All other checks passed: - Lint: All checks passed - Type check (ty): All checks passed - Unit Tests (erk): 6020 passed in 26.63s - Tests (erk-dev): 136 passed in 5.98s - Tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed in 0.88s - Tests (erk-mcp): 28 passed
The failure is specifically in the Prettier formatting step - the markdown documentation files have formatting inconsistencies that need to be resolved.
